title: ECL scout-report profile v1 (vendored)
description: Vendored copy of eidolons-ecl/schemas/per-eidolon/scout-report.v1.json for self-contained ATLAS validation. Validates the ECL envelope YAML frontmatter for an ATLAS scout-report payload; the body structure is governed by schemas/scout-report.v1.json in this repo. Source-of-truth is the central ECL spec at Rynaro/eidolons-ecl; re-vendor when ECL publishes a new profile version.

decision_target.description: The DECISION_TARGET sub-question the mission was framed around.

scope.description: ECL envelope frontmatter scope fields. NOTE: these differ from the body's mission_recap.scope.{include,exclude} fields in scout-report.v1.json — they are different layers, not duplicates.
